title: Strait Of Hormuz Shutdown, Oil Supply Crisis Triggers 'Red Zone' Warning
summary_full: The IEA has already issued warnings about 'the most severe disruption' ever; in April agency chief Fatih Birol told CNBC: "We are facing the biggest energy security threat in history."
summary_public: The IEA has already issued warnings about 'the most severe disruption' ever; in April agency chief Fatih Birol told CNBC: "We are facing the biggest energy security threat in history."
